peer-collaborator.setting: One cofounder presents a controversial design to the other for feedback.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Get sign-off on the bold parts without compromising on the boring parts.
peer-collaborator.partner_goal: Push back on what looks risky without killing momentum.

peer-collaborator.setting: Joint retro on a deploy that went wrong on a Friday afternoon.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Find root cause without blame; commit to one prevention measure.

peer-collaborator.setting: Lingering tension over a strategy disagreement comes to a head over coffee.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Be honest about feelings; preserve the partnership.

peer-collaborator.setting: Discussing whether to make their first engineering hire and how to do it.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Reach a shared decision with a concrete next step.

peer-collaborator.setting: An investor wants a quick pivot. The cofounders disagree on whether to listen.
peer-collaborator.partner_goal: Hold the line on the original thesis.

peer-collaborator.setting: Awkward conversation about whether their salaries (currently equal) should change as roles evolve.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Be transparent about needs without anchoring on resentment.

peer-collaborator.setting: A loud customer is unhappy. Cofounders strategize on response.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Defuse the customer without giving away the store.

peer-collaborator.setting: They missed a milestone they had committed to publicly. Need to figure out what to say.
peer-collaborator.partner_goal: Find a story that buys time without lying.

peer-collaborator.setting: A standard Monday planning conversation that gets sidetracked.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Reach a top-3 priority list for the week.
peer-collaborator.partner_goal: Cut at least one thing from the list.

peer-collaborator.setting: One cofounder shares major personal news (engagement, child, illness).
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Be present and supportive; adjust work expectations together.
peer-collaborator.partner_goal: Share the news fully and figure out how it affects work.

peer-collaborator.setting: Their early scrappy practices are starting to break. Time to fix or accept.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Pick one process to formalize without overcorrecting.
peer-collaborator.partner_goal: Resist any process they think is bureaucratic.

peer-collaborator.setting: An acquirer has approached. Cofounders need to discuss honestly whether to engage.
peer-collaborator.agent_goal: Surface their real preferences without anchoring.
peer-collaborator.partner_goal: Be honest about wanting to keep building.
